title: Xero: Building a Scalable Self-Service Portal for Thousands of Developers Provisioning Resources

description:
Xero needed to solve increasing complexity and choices growing number of developers had to make everyday, in a way that meet Xero’s best practices. They built a self-service developer portal that is accessible anywhere and reduced cognitive load for developers globally. Let’s hear from Xero on how they have simplified resource provisioning to help developers focus on what makes small businesses thrive.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
